---
id: list-registrations
title: "List registrations"
description: "Returns SIP registrations for the specified domain."
sidebar_label: "List registrations"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/v1/fs-pbx-api
custom_edit_url: null

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List registrations"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/registrations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns SIP registrations for the specified domain.

Pagination (snapshot cursor-based):
- Both `limit` and `starting_after` are optional.
- If `limit` is not provided, it defaults to 50.
- If `starting_after` is not provided, results start from the beginning.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"limit","description":"Optional. Number of results to return (min 1, max 100). Defaults to 50.","example":50,"required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Optional. Number of results to return (min 1, max 100). Defaults to 50.","example":50}},{"in":"query","name":"starting_after","description":"Optional. Return results after this registration call-id in the current snapshot.","example":"8434b4e1-4f5d-4a85-9cab-2f31a8cb7010","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Return results after this registration call-id in the current snapshot.","example":"8434b4e1-4f5d-4a85-9cab-2f31a8cb7010"}},{"in":"query","name":"search","description":"Optional. Search IP, agent, transport, profile, auth user, or auth realm.","example":"101","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Search IP, agent, transport, profile, auth user, or auth realm.","example":"101"}},{"in":"query","name":"sort","description":"Optional. Sort field. One of: sip_auth_user, sip_auth_realm, agent, lan_ip, wan_ip, port, status, expsecs, ping_time, sip_profile_name. Defaults to sip_auth_user.","example":"sip_auth_user","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Sort field. One of: sip_auth_user, sip_auth_realm, agent, lan_ip, wan_ip, port, status, expsecs, ping_time, sip_profile_name. Defaults to sip_auth_user.","example":"sip_auth_user"}},{"in":"query","name":"order","description":"Optional. Sort direction: asc or desc. Defaults to asc.","example":"asc","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Sort direction: asc or desc. Defaults to asc.","example":"asc"}},{"in":"path","name":"domain_uuid","description":"The domain UUID.","example":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
